resources.title: How to build an AI agent for Slack with Chat SDK and AI SDK
resources.description: Build a Slack AI agent using Chat SDK, AI SDK's ToolLoopAgent, and Vercel AI Gateway. Covers project setup, tool definitions, streaming responses, deployment to Vercel, and scaling tool selection with toolpick.

resources.title: Human-in-the-Loop with Chat SDK and Workflow SDK
resources.description: Pause durable workflows on Slack approval cards using Chat SDK and Workflow SDK. Uses createWebhook to suspend workflows until a button click, with patterns for multi-stage approvals, timeouts via durable sleep, and approver validation.

resources.title: How to build an agent for Liveblocks
resources.description: Build an AI agent that replies to @-mentions in Liveblocks comment threads with streamed responses and tool calling. Uses Chat SDK, the Liveblocks adapter, AI SDK's ToolLoopAgent, and Redis for thread subscriptions and distributed locking.

resources.title: How to build a Slack bot that manages files in Vercel Blob
resources.description: Build a Slack bot that lists, reads, uploads, and deletes files in Vercel Blob through tool calls. Uses Chat SDK, AI SDK's ToolLoopAgent, and Files SDK's createFileTools factory with approval-gated write tools and a read-only mode.

resources.title: Run and track deploys from Slack
resources.description: Build a Slack deploy bot with Chat SDK and Vercel Workflow. Dispatch GitHub Actions from a slash command, gate production behind approval, poll for completion, and notify Linear and GitHub when the run finishes.

resources.title: Triage form submissions with Chat SDK
resources.description: Build a Slack bot that triages form submissions with interactive cards. Forward, edit, or mark as spam without leaving Slack. Built with Chat SDK, Hono, and Resend.

resources.title: How to build a Slack bot with Next.js and Redis
resources.description: This guide walks through building a Slack bot with Next.js, covering project setup, Slack app configuration, event handling, interactive features, and deployment.

resources.title: Create a Discord support bot with Nuxt and Redis
resources.description: This guide walks through building a Discord support bot with Nuxt, covering project setup, Discord app configuration, Gateway forwarding, AI-powered responses, and deployment.

resources.title: Ship a GitHub code review bot with Hono and Redis
resources.description: This guide walks through building a GitHub bot that reviews pull requests on demand. When a user @mentions the bot on a PR, Chat SDK picks up the mention, spins up a Vercel Sandbox with the repo cloned, and uses AI SDK to analyze the diff.

resources.title: Build your own Slackbot with Vercel Connect
resources.description: Learn how to build your very own Slackbot with Chat SDK and AI SDK. Vercel Connect supplies runtime Slack tokens and forwards triggers, so you never store a long-lived bot token.

resources.title: Give your agents secure access to third-party APIs
resources.description: Use Vercel Connect to call provider APIs like Slack, GitHub, and Snowflake from your agents and services with short-lived, user-authorized tokens instead of long-lived secrets.

resources.title: Build AI agents with AI Gateway and AI SDK
resources.description: Build AI agents on Vercel with AI Gateway and AI SDK, then make them reliable, capable, and durable with Sandbox, Chat SDK, Vercel Connect, and Workflow.

resources.title: Build a daily digest bot with Chat SDK and Workflow SDK
resources.description: Create your own daily digest bot that posts a daily digest of GitHub stats to Slack. Learn how to use Vercel Connect to set up Slack and GitHub app securely in your project.

resources.title: Chat SDK Liveblocks Bot
resources.description: Build a bot that you can engage with inside Liveblocks.

resources.title: Durable iMessage Agent
resources.description: Durable iMessage agent powered by the Sendblue adapter.

resources.title: Knowledge Agent
resources.description: Open source file-system and knowledge based agent template. Build AI agents that stay up to date with your knowledge base.

resources.title: Community Agent
resources.description: Open source AI-powered Slack community management bot with a built-in Next.js admin panel. Uses Chat SDK, AI SDK, and Vercel Workflow.

resources.title: Caltext
resources.description: iMessage calorie tracking assistant powered by AI.
